optionA.text: Both cephalic and anal plaques absent
Rostrate uncini in double rows, posterior segments with encircling collars

optionB.text: Rostrate uncini in single rows, posterior segments not collared

optionA.text: More than 20 setigers present
Setiger 4 with a deep encircling collar
Pygidium with anus at the end of a simple, upturned, flattened cone
Pygidium flattened with anus dorsal
Cephalic plaque absent, anal plaque present

optionB.text: Both cephalic and anal plaques present

optionA.text: Rostrate uncini in all setigers

optionB.text: Acicular spines in first three setigers, thereafter rostrate uncini

optionA.text: Anal funnel symmetrically developed

optionB.text: Anal funnel asymmetrical, with the dorsal side reduced

optionA.text: Anus dorsal
Rostrate uncini in two or three series in most setigers

optionB.text: Rostrate uncini always in single series

optionA.text: First three setigers with acicular neuropodial spines

optionB.text: First setiger either without neurosetae or with rostrate uncini

optionA.text: Cephalic keel long and high, cephalic rim shallowly notched laterally

optionB.text: Cephalic keel short and low, cephalic rim deeply incised laterally

optionA.text: Numerous branchial filaments on median setigers
Series of vascular caeca cover the surface of the two last setigers
Anal plaque marginally smooth or gently crenulated

optionB.text: Anal plaque bordered by distinct anal cirri

optionA.text: First setiger with notosetae only; anal plaque gently crenulated

optionB.text: First setiger with noto- and neurosetae; anal plaque smooth

optionA.text: All anal cirri similar in length

optionB.text: Midventral anal cirrus (rarely two) distinctly longer than all other anal cirri

optionA.text: More than 30 setigers present
Acicular spines in the first neuropodia
Setiger 4 with a deep encircling collar
First setiger with notosetae only; anal plaque with numerous cirri

optionB.text: First setiger with both noto- and neurosetae; anal plaque with a few long cirri only

optionA.text: More than 30 setigers present
Setiger 4 with a deep encircling collar
Anterior neuropodia with rostrate uncini
Anal plaque with two large ventral and several shorter lateral and dorsal anal cirri

optionB.text: A single large ventral cirrus and several shorter lateral and dorsal anal cirri present

optionA.text: Nuchal slits short, straight and diverging anteriorly

optionB.text: Nuchal slits long, straight and parallel

optionA.text: Anal cone projecting well beyond the rim of the anal plaque

optionB.text: Anal cone low and not projecting beyond the rim of the anal plaque

optionA.text: Apart from the long ventral anal cirrus, all other anal cirri similar in length
